title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community mental health services include individual, group, and family therapy for adults and children; help with parenting issues; anger management classes for adults and adolescents; psychiatric assessment and medication management; case management for people with severe and persistent mental illness; stress reduction classes; and pain management classes. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone/Crisis Line (541) 889-9167 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Anger Management Child Guidance Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Pain Management Parent Counseling Psychiatric Case Management Psychiatric Medication Services Stress Management Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - PEER SUPPORT CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREASURE VALLEY REGION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWAYS INC
